_meta.description: SlideForge Campaign Presets v2 — full-spectrum catalog for AI-agent carousel generation. Covers brand, education, data, political, sociological, psychological, spiritual, and narrative campaigns.
rhythm_principles: Never repeat the same slide_type consecutively (exception: within repeatable unit_slides, types may repeat across units)
Alternate dark/light bg_style for visual contrast (DLD pattern: Dark-Light-Dark)
Hook → Context → Evidence → Proof → Action arc
Dense data slides alternate with sparse narrative slides
CTA is always the final slide
Repeatable blocks create rhythm through variation-in-repetition: same structure, different content

repeatable_block_syntax.description: A repeatable block contains unit_slides that repeat N times with different content. The AI agent decides iteration count based on content depth. {{unit_index}} auto-increments (1, 2, 3, ...) for each iteration.

structure.unit_slides: array of slide objects with params_template

repeatable_block_syntax.variable_injection: {{unit_index}} is auto-incremented. All other {{variables}} are filled by the AI agent per iteration.

presets.name: Product Launch
presets.description: Announce a new product or major feature release. Hook with impact, explain the problem it solves, show proof it works, close with access.
presets.rhythm: Hero → Problem → Features → Proof → CTA

presets.name: Brand Origin Story
presets.description: Tell the story of how/why the brand was created. Journey → Milestones → Values → Vision → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Image → Story → Timeline → Values → Vision → CTA

presets.name: Feature Deep-Dive
presets.description: Deep dive into a single feature or capability. Hook → What → How → Why It Matters → Proof → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Explanation → Visual → Data → Social Proof → CTA

presets.name: E-commerce / Product Showcase
presets.description: Showcase a product with images, features, and social proof.
presets.rhythm: Image → Features → Gallery → Review → Price → CTA

slides.description: Stack 2-3 reviews from different customers for credibility depth

presets.name: Behind-the-Scenes
presets.description: Show the process, team, or craft behind the product.
presets.rhythm: Image → Process → Image → Values → Quote → CTA

presets.name: Educational / How-To
presets.description: Teach a concept or walk through a process step-by-step. Each step is a repeatable module with its own dedicated slides.
presets.rhythm: Definition → [Step Module × N] → Checklist → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a complete learning module: section divider + visual + explanation. Agent fills different content per step.

presets.name: Thought Leadership
presets.description: Share a contrarian insight or industry perspective. Myth → Insight → Evidence points (repeatable) → Framework → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Myth → Insight → [Evidence × N] → Framework → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents one evidence point with a different visualization type for visual variety

presets.name: Data Story / Analytics
presets.description: Lead with numbers and visualizations. Metrics → Charts (repeatable) → Insights → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Headline → Metric → [Chart + Insight × N] → Summary → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration pairs a chart with an insight callout for data → interpretation rhythm

presets.name: Case Study / Success Story
presets.description: Showcase client success stories. Supports stacking multiple case studies as repeatable units.
presets.rhythm: Hook → [Case Study × N] → Aggregate Proof → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a complete case study: challenge → before/after → results → testimonial

presets.name: Testimonial / Social Proof
presets.description: Stack social proof to build trust. Logo cloud → Multiple testimonials (repeatable) → Results → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Logos → [Quote × N] → Data → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a testimonial. Alternate between avatar-style and image-quote-style for visual variety.

presets.name: Comparison / Alternative
presets.description: Compare two options (your product vs competitor, or old way vs new way).
presets.rhythm: Hook → Table → Visual Compare → Features → Verdict → CTA

presets.name: Event / Webinar Promo
presets.description: Promote an upcoming event or webinar.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Agenda → Speaker → Outcomes → Register → CTA

presets.name: Political Candidate Introduction
presets.description: Introduce a candidate with authority, values, and endorsements. Emotional arc: Trust → Connection → Authority → Commitment.
presets.rhythm: Hero → Origin → Values → Policy Grid → Endorsement → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a policy position: problem → solution → evidence

presets.name: Political Policy Position
presets.description: Deep-dive into a specific policy position. Repeatable evidence blocks build the case systematically.
presets.rhythm: Problem Statement → [Evidence Block × N] → Impact → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is an evidence block: data visualization + interpretation callout

presets.name: Political Contrast / Attack
presets.description: Side-by-side contrast with opponent. Their record vs our record. Uses comparison and before/after for maximum impact.
presets.rhythm: Hook → Their Record → Our Record → Comparison → Verdict → CTA

presets.name: Political Mobilization / Get Out The Vote
presets.description: Rally supporters to action. Urgency → What's at stake → How to act → Social proof → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Urgency → Stakes → Proof → How-To → Social Proof → CTA

presets.name: Sociological Commentary
presets.description: Social critique with data-driven analysis. Observation → Data evidence (repeatable) → Reframe → Call to awareness.
presets.rhythm: Observation → [Evidence × N] → Analysis → Reframe → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents evidence: data visualization + interpretation

presets.name: Sociological Movement Building
presets.description: Build a social movement. Problem → Who we are → What we want → How to join → Momentum → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Problem → Identity → Vision → Steps → Momentum → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration presents a fact or statistic that builds the case for action

presets.name: Psychological Framework Education
presets.description: Teach a behavioral model or psychological principle. Concept → Principles (repeatable) → Application → Practice → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Concept → [Principle × N] → Application → Practice → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a principle: visual example + explanation + myth-busting

presets.name: Psychological Self-Improvement
presets.description: Self-improvement arc. Current state → Desired state → Bridge (repeatable steps) → Transformation proof → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Current State → Desired State → [Step × N] → Proof → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a transformation step: section divider + visual + detail

presets.name: Persuasion Technique Education
presets.description: Teach persuasion principles. Principle → How it works → Example → How to apply → Ethics → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Principle → Mechanism → Example → Application → Ethics → CTA

presets.name: Spiritual / Philosophical Teaching
presets.description: Teach a spiritual or philosophical concept. Concept → Definition → Teachings (repeatable) → Practice → Wisdom → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Concept → [Teaching × N] → Practice → Wisdom → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a teaching: quote/insight + visual + explanation

presets.name: Spiritual Practice / Meditation Guide
presets.description: Guide a spiritual practice. Intention → Preparation → Practice (repeatable stages) → Integration → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Intention → Preparation → [Stage × N] → Integration → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a practice stage: visual + instruction + focus point

presets.name: Narrative Arc / Story-Based Persuasion
presets.description: Tell a story with repeatable scenes. Opening hook → [Scene × N] → Climax → Resolution → CTA.
presets.rhythm: Hook → [Scene × N] → Climax → Resolution → CTA

slides.description: Each iteration is a scene: image + narrative text + emotional beat

presets.name: Emotional Funnel / Fear → Hope → Action
presets.description: Systematic emotional manipulation arc. Fear → Evidence → Contrast → Hope → Proof → Action. Repeatable fear/hope beats.
presets.rhythm: Fear → [Evidence × N] → Contrast → Hope → Proof → CTA
presets.emotional_arc: Fear → Urgency → Contrast → Hope → Trust → Commitment

slides.description: Each iteration builds the fear case: data + interpretation
